---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=25mm
      - left=22mm
      - right=22mm
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: true
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    output-file: cv
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhead[L]{Rodrigo Aguayo}
          \fancyhead[R]{Curriculum Vitae}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \usepackage{enumitem}
          \setlist{nosep,leftmargin=2em}
          \setlength{\parskip}{0.5em}
          \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
---

<div class="page">

<a href="cv.pdf" class="download-btn">⬇ Download PDF</a>

```{=html}
<div style="height: 1rem;"></div>
```

{{< include _includes/cv-content.md >}}

## Publications

{{< include _includes/cv-publications.md >}}

</div>
